current_market_thesis.overall: Bear market state of mind since Q4 2025. Operating under assumption that lower highs will continue through midterm year 2026.
current_market_thesis.btc_cycle_view: We are in a midterm year (Year 2 post-halving). Bitcoin is tracking the average of prior midterm years (2014, 2018, 2022). Bearish first half of 2026 due to macro headwinds and 4-year cycle.
current_market_thesis.btc_bottom_base_case: October 2026 - based on 4-year cycle, prior midterm year bottoms, and S&P correlation
current_market_thesis.btc_bottom_alternative: May 2026 - if capitulation happens faster and BTC drops below realized price
current_market_thesis.btc_near_term: March rally likely a lower high, then weakness into April-May
current_market_thesis.gold_view: Sizable correction expected for metals in 2026. Bull market support band needs to catch up.
current_market_thesis.eth_view: ETH will spend more time in regression band in 2026. ETH/BTC ratio continues bleeding.
current_market_thesis.business_cycle: Business cycle has max 2-3 years left. Could end 2026-2028.

key_themes: Bear market state of mind: assume lower highs are lower highs in midterm years
October 2026 most likely BTC bottom based on 4-year cycle
May 2026 second most likely window if capitulation accelerates
BTC tracking average of prior midterm years (2014, 2018, 2022)
March rallies form lower highs, then April-May weakness follows
Logarithmic regression provides fair value anchor for BTC
Below lower regression band = extreme accumulation zone
200-week SMA crossing prior ATH = cycle top signal
Oil spikes end business cycles - watch crude closely
Business cycle has 2-3 years left, recession probability rising
Gold correction expected in 2026 after secular bull
S&P weakest in midterm years: late Q3 to early Q4

midterm_year_pattern.typical_flow: Early strength -> March lower high -> April-June weakness -> possible bottom May or October
midterm_year_pattern.2026_tracking: Bitcoin underperforming average of prior midterm years as of March 2026

sentiment_from_transcripts.overall_lean: Cautiously bearish — Cowen mentions bullish setups but with significant bearish and cautious qualifiers

latest_video: Bitcoin: The Structure of a Bear Market
